acceptance_criteria.criterion: SQLAlchemy ORM models defined for all 8 core tables: documents, document_categories, extraction_schemas, extraction_fields, extracted_values, document_summaries, bulk_jobs, bulk_job_documents
Memory models defined: conversation_summaries, memory_entries
DocumentStatus enum includes all 7 states: uploaded, parsed, edited, classified, extracted, summarized, ingested
All models use UUID primary keys with server-side defaults
All models include created_at and updated_at timestamp columns

Foreign key relationships defined: documents<->categories, extraction_schemas<->categories, extraction_fields<->schemas, extracted_values<->documents+fields, document_summaries<->documents, bulk_job_documents<->bulk_jobs+documents

config.yml loaded with storage paths (upload_dir, parsed_dir, schemas_dir), chunking parameters (max_tokens, overlap_tokens), bulk concurrency setting, and RAG defaults (default_search_mode, default_alpha, top_k)
.env loaded with OPENAI_API_KEY, REDUCTO_API_KEY, DATABASE_URL, WEAVIATE_URL, OPENAI_MODEL
Configuration accessible as typed Pydantic settings objects with validation
Missing required environment variables raise a clear error message at startup with the variable name
Default values provided for non-secret config: upload_dir="./data/upload", parsed_dir="./data/parsed", max_tokens=512, overlap_tokens=100
Async SQLAlchemy engine created with asyncpg driver using DATABASE_URL from config
Async session factory configured with connection pooling (pool_size=5, max_overflow=10)
Alembic configured for async migrations with proper env.py setup
Initial migration creates all 10 tables (8 core + 2 memory) matching ORM models
alembic upgrade head runs successfully against an empty PostgreSQL 16 database
FastAPI app created via factory function with CORS middleware allowing localhost origins
GET /api/v1/health returns 200 with {"status": "healthy"} when database is reachable
Health endpoint returns 503 with {"status": "unhealthy", "detail": "..."} when database is unreachable
All API routes use /api/v1 prefix
Lifespan handler initializes database connection pool on startup and closes on shutdown

api_checks.description: Health endpoint returns 200 with status healthy when database is reachable
Health endpoint returns 503 with status unhealthy and detail field when database is unreachable
Non-prefixed health path returns 404, confirming all routes use /api/v1 prefix
CORS preflight returns allow-origin header for localhost origin

code_inspections.check: File defines classes for all 8 core tables: documents, document_categories, extraction_schemas, extraction_fields, extracted_values, document_summaries, bulk_jobs, bulk_job_documents
File defines memory models: conversation_summaries, memory_entries
DocumentStatus enum includes all 7 states: uploaded, parsed, edited, classified, extracted, summarized, ingested
All model primary keys are UUID type with server_default=gen_random_uuid() or uuid4
All models include created_at and updated_at columns with appropriate defaults

ForeignKey constraints defined for: documents->categories, extraction_schemas->categories, extraction_fields->schemas, extracted_values->documents+fields, document_summaries->documents, bulk_job_documents->bulk_jobs+documents

YAML file contains keys for storage.upload_dir, storage.parsed_dir, storage.schemas_dir, chunking.max_tokens, chunking.overlap_tokens, bulk.concurrency, rag.default_search_mode, rag.default_alpha, rag.top_k
Example env file lists OPENAI_API_KEY, REDUCTO_API_KEY, DATABASE_URL, WEAVIATE_URL, OPENAI_MODEL
Settings classes inherit from pydantic BaseSettings or pydantic_settings BaseSettings with typed fields
Required env vars (secrets) have no default value so Pydantic raises ValidationError with field name on missing
Default values set: upload_dir='./data/upload', parsed_dir='./data/parsed', max_tokens=512, overlap_tokens=100
create_async_engine called with postgresql+asyncpg URL from config
async_sessionmaker or AsyncSession factory created with pool_size=5 and max_overflow=10
env.py uses run_async_migrations or connectable.run_sync pattern for async Alembic

Migration upgrade() creates all 10 tables: documents, document_categories, extraction_schemas, extraction_fields, extracted_values, document_summaries, bulk_jobs, bulk_job_documents, conversation_summaries, memory_entries
App factory function adds CORSMiddleware with allowed origins including localhost
Router included with prefix='/api/v1' or app mounted at /api/v1
Lifespan context manager or startup/shutdown events initialize and dispose the database engine
